message:
feat(fcp-bootstrap): PKCS#11 hardware token discovery with detection stages and issue reporting

hardware_token.rs: Implement real PKCS#11 token discovery via the
cryptoki crate.  New DetectionStage enum (ProviderMissing, LoadProvider,
InitializeProvider, EnumerateSlots, NormalizeSlotId, ReadTokenInfo,
ReadMechanisms, FinalizeProvider) and DetectionIssue struct for
granular failure reporting at each probe stage.

detect_hardware_tokens_live() probes configured PKCS#11 provider
libraries, enumerates slots, reads token labels and mechanism lists,
and returns both successfully detected tokens and any issues
encountered.  Uses a global OnceLock + Mutex for provider
initialization safety.

lib.rs: Module visibility updates.
workflow.rs: Bootstrap workflow adjustments.
Cargo.toml: Add cryptoki dependency.
Integration tests: New detection probe coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,6 +29,7 @@ ciborium.workspace = true
 ed25519-dalek.workspace = true
 x25519-dalek.workspace = true
 blake3.workspace = true
+cryptoki.workspace = true
 frost-ed25519 = "2.2"
 hkdf.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
